_comment: Committed corpus-contract overrides, merged over the fetched expected.json by `file`. The corpus ships as a separately-versioned release asset (see corpus.lock.json), so a parser fix in code lands before expected.json can be regenerated and re-released. This is the in-repo, CI-reachable home for a fixture's updated contract in that window — it carries the full expectation (kind, parser, asserts) so golden-value coverage isn't lost. Remove an entry once the debrief-fixtures corpus is re-cut to include it. An override only applies when its target file is present in the fetched corpus.

fixtures.note: RRC3 mDACS imperial (UTF-16, TAB); altitude unit resolved from the barometric pressure column; ~13304 ft. Pending debrief-fixtures re-cut.
RRC3 mDACS metric (EUROPEAN semicolon + comma-decimal); altitude unit resolved from the barometric pressure column; ~9121 ft. Pending debrief-fixtures re-cut.

Eggtimer EUROPEAN semicolon export; feet read via the delimiter-aware parser (was mapper metres, 3.3x high). Cross-checks RRC3 same flight ~9121 ft. Velocity column is corrupt (withheld). Pending debrief-fixtures re-cut.
Eggtimer EUROPEAN semicolon export (ARIS EULER explosion flight); feet via delimiter-aware parser (was mapper metres). Apogee ~958 ft vs device summary ~976 ft. Pending debrief-fixtures re-cut.
fixtures.knownIssue: ARIS Euler explosion flight — the in-air breakup corrupts the descent phase (a negative "main" rate), so it is parsed but not invariant-asserted. With the delimiter-aware Eggtimer parser its apogee now reads ~958 ft (feet) vs the device summary ~976 ft, instead of ~2808 ft via the generic mapper (metres).

fixtures.note: AltOS radio-telemetry CSV (tick/ptype); lossy and truncated mid-descent, but apogee ~13268 ft matches the on-board flight-log read. Was mapping. Pending debrief-fixtures re-cut.
